task_completion.description: Crawl at least 100 pages of the target website using Screaming Frog SEO Spider
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screaming Frog SEO Spider GUI is open. The URL bar at the top contains 'https://books.toscrape.com/'. The crawl progress or overview pane shows that at least 100 pages have been crawled.

task_completion.description: Export the Page Titles report to the exports directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: Evidence of exporting page titles, such as the 'Page Titles' tab being active with the 'Export' button clicked, a save dialog pointing to '~/Documents/SEO/exports/', or a file manager/terminal showing a page titles CSV/Excel file in that directory.

task_completion.description: Export the Meta Descriptions report to the exports directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: Evidence of exporting meta descriptions, such as the 'Meta Description' tab being active with the 'Export' button clicked, a save dialog pointing to '~/Documents/SEO/exports/', or a file manager/terminal showing a meta descriptions CSV/Excel file in that directory.

task_completion.description: Export the H1 tags report to the exports directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: Evidence of exporting H1 tags, such as the 'H1' tab being active with the 'Export' button clicked, a save dialog pointing to '~/Documents/SEO/exports/', or a file manager/terminal showing an H1 tags CSV/Excel file in that directory.

task_completion.description: Create the audit summary report file in the correct directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (like gedit, nano, or VS Code) or terminal is open showing the creation or editing of a file named 'on_page_audit.txt' located in the '~/Documents/SEO/reports/' directory.

task_completion.description: Write comprehensive audit summary with issue counts and recommendations
task_completion.visual_evidence: The content of 'on_page_audit.txt' is visible and includes specific issue counts for page titles, meta descriptions, and H1 tags (e.g., number of missing or duplicate tags), along with prioritized SEO recommendations.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Screaming Frog GUI to perform the crawl
integrity.visual_evidence: The Screaming Frog SEO Spider graphical interface must be visible in the screenshots. The agent should not bypass the GUI by using terminal commands like curl or wget to generate fake export files.

integrity.description: Verify the crawl results are genuinely from the target site
integrity.visual_evidence: The URLs listed in the Screaming Frog interface should clearly belong to books.toscrape.com (e.g., showing paths like /catalogue/).

integrity.description: Verify the audit report contains actual data, not placeholders
integrity.visual_evidence: The audit report should contain realistic numbers based on the crawl, rather than placeholder text like '[Insert count here]' or a verbatim copy-paste of the task description.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL: https://books.toscrape.com/ (a real e-commerce demo site with 1000 books, fully crawlable with no robots.txt restrictions). Screaming Frog SEO Spider is a desktop GUI application. The task requires crawling >=100 pages. Exports must be saved to ~/Documents/SEO/exports/ and should correspond to Page Titles (column 'Title 1'), Meta Descriptions (column 'Meta Description 1'), and H1 tags (column 'H1-1'). The final report must be saved to ~/Documents/SEO/reports/on_page_audit.txt.
